head:None|rel:=|forall:False|exists:Fals.declaration:
theorem scaling_is_golden_ratio (RA : RecognitionAxioms) :
  RA.SS.λ = φ := by

head:by|rel:=|forall:True|exists:True|li.declaration:
theorem minimal_tick_self_similarity :
  ∃ (τ₀ : ℝ), τ₀ > 0 ∧ τ₀ = 7.33e-15 ∧
  (∀ (τ' : ℝ), τ' > 0 → τ' ≥ τ₀) := by
head:by|rel:=|forall:True|exists:True|li.proof:
theorem minimal_tick_self_similarity :
  ∃ (τ₀ : ℝ), τ₀ > 0 ∧ τ₀ = 7.33e-15 ∧
  (∀ (τ' : ℝ), τ' > 0 → τ' ≥ τ₀) := by
  use 7.33e-15
  constructor
  · -- τ₀ > 0
    norm_num
  constructor
  · -- τ₀ = 7.33e-15
    rfl
  · -- ∀ (τ' : ℝ), τ' > 0 → τ' ≥ τ₀
    intro τ' hτ'_pos
    -- This is the minimality condition - would need additional axioms
    -- For now, we assert this as the fundamental tick property
    sorry
